Good Afternoon,
I work for a company called Comtech Solutions, the company behind CookieScan.
I’m reaching out because we’re building a network of web developers and digital agencies who want to offer a reliable, fully compliant cookie consent solution to their clients, and earn recurring revenue while doing so.
As you’re aware, cookie compliance is now a fundamental requirement for almost every website that uses cookies or tracking technologies, given GDPR, ePrivacy/PECR and even CCPA and other global regulations. Many clients struggle to implement a compliant, customisable cookie notice and consent management solution and are asking their web developers for that service.
That’s where CookieScan comes in.
CookieScan is a comprehensive cookie consent management platform. It automates cookie scanning, identifies and categorises cookies on a site, and generates compliant cookie banners and notices. You can manage consent logs, adapt banners based on regional requirements, and integrate easily with a single JavaScript line or via Google Tag Manager.
It also supports geo-location and geo-blocking, so banners and cookie behaviour can adapt automatically depending on a visitor’s region, especially useful for developers working with clients in multiple jurisdictions.
Why It’s Great for Your Clients
Using CookieScan with your build or maintenance service means:
Your clients get a banner that fits their brand and messaging. You can fully customise colours, text, and interface.
Compliance is automated and stays up to date with regulatory changes.
You can manage multiple client domains from a single reseller dashboard.
Clients get a free 14-day trial on all plans, so they can see the product in action before subscribing.

How the Reseller Program Works
Once approved as a reseller, you get access to your own portal where you can:
Add any number of client subscriptions under your dashboard.
Customise and activate client accounts for them.
Provide full implementation using the unique reseller code.

You can decide how you package the service, whether you include it in your build or charge separately, and you retain control over client pricing.
Commission Structure
CookieScan offers a generous recurring revenue structure that rewards growth:
Tier 1: 25% initial commission and 12% renewal commission for 0–49 subscriptions
Tier 2: 35% initial and 15% renewal for 50–99 subscriptions
Tier 3: 45% initial and 20% renewal for 100–199 subscriptions
Tier 4: 50% initial and 25% renewal for 200+ subscriptions

This means that as you scale clients on CookieScan, you retain a higher share, resulting in a predictable, long-term revenue stream.
If you’d like, I can show you how the platform works and how it can be packaged into your existing services.
I look forward to hearing from you.

Aimee Byrne
